demo_layer_statement: This is a demonstration layer, not production orchestration, autonomous execution, approval automation, provider routing, semantic autonomy, an agent runtime, a provider mesh, or automatic continuation.
artifact_flow: human request reference enters the envelope as explicit context
envelope validation returns an in-memory validation report
validator composition consumes explicit validator declarations and returns an aggregate validation report
continuity report synthesis consumes explicit reports, replay references, lifecycle references, semantic boundaries, authority boundaries, lineage references, findings, and risks
continuity report is rendered or inspected as read-only observability evidence

authority_boundaries.human_request: supplies intent context but does not silently authorize execution
authority_boundaries.aigol_agol: validates, composes, and synthesizes report-only continuity evidence

operational_proving_goals: implemented primitives can form a bounded continuity chain
envelope validation output can feed validator composition
validator composition output can feed continuity synthesis
replay and lifecycle visibility can be summarized without mutation
sidepanel observability can present continuity state without authority
deterministic governance evidence can support operator review
continuity validity remains separate from approval or execution
bounded_acceptance_criteria: deterministic flow from explicit human request context to continuity report
continuity report identity is stable for the same inputs
replay and lifecycle summaries remain visible
recommended_next_step: Prepare MINIMAL_GOVERNED_OPERATIONAL_LOOP_DEMO_IMPLEMENTATION_REVIEW_V1 before runnable demo code, verifying read-only, deterministic, explicit-input-only, observability-only behavior with no runtime authority, provider calls, orchestration, or hidden persistence.
